SymptomNavigator.title: What concerns you?

ChatAssistant.welcome: Hi! I'm the clinic's AI assistant. Tell me what's bothering you and I'll suggest a doctor and the earliest free slot.
ChatAssistant.suggestion1: My head has been hurting since morning
ChatAssistant.suggestion2: Which doctor should I see for chest pain?
ChatAssistant.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us.
ChatAssistant.disclaimer: AI suggestions are not a medical diagnosis. In an emergency call 112.

AiAssistantPage.title: AI Assistant
AiAssistantPage.subtitle: Describe your symptoms — the assistant will suggest a suitable doctor and the earliest free slot, based on the clinic's own data.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Khozrevanidze Clinic
About.description: Khozrevanidze Clinic is a multifield medical center serving both children and adults. It is equipped with 40 beds in comfortable wards, ultramodern apparatuses and operational units.
About.qualityText: Our Clinic provides high standard medical services, in line with the recommendations of international health organizations, European and American guidelines and protocols.

HealthLibrary.labTestsCardDescription: Browse the full catalog of laboratory tests — what each measures, how to prepare, and how to interpret your results.

Booking.title: Book a Visit
Booking.subtitle: Online Appointment
Booking.metaDescription: Book an appointment at Khozrevanidze Clinic. Choose your specialist, date and time online.
Booking.successMessage: Your appointment has been booked successfully. You will receive a confirmation shortly.
Booking.serviceHint: Choose the medical department for your visit
Booking.orSearchByName: or search any doctor by name
Booking.noResults: No services found matching your search
Booking.dateHint: Pick a date and available time slot
Booking.pickDateFirst: Select a date to see available times
Booking.noSlots: No available time slots for this date
Booking.infoHint: Please provide your personal details for the appointment
Booking.confirmHint: Please verify all details before confirming
Booking.disclaimer: By confirming your booking you agree to the clinic's appointment policy. Please arrive 10 minutes before your scheduled time.
